# 02 — Generate encryption key on session create and embed in share URL

Status: ready-for-agent
Labels: enhancement

*This was generated by AI during triage.*

## What

When a new session is created on the landing page, no encryption key is generated. `getShareUrl` in `src/lib/session.ts:29` returns `host/s/id` with no fragment. Without the `#key` in the URL the share link is useless once encryption is wired — recipients can't decrypt anything.

## Requirements

- On session creation (in `LandingPage.tsx`, when navigating to `/s/:id`), call `generateKey()` then `exportKey(key)` from `crypto.ts` to get a base64 string
- Navigate to `/s/${id}#${base64Key}` instead of `/s/${id}`
- Update `getShareUrl` in `session.ts` to read `location.hash` and append it: `${location.host}/s/${sessionId}${location.hash}`
- On `EditorPage` load, read the key from `location.hash.slice(1)`, import it with `importKey(base64)`, and make it available to the WS and snapshot layers (via context or a module-level ref)
- If the hash is missing or `importKey` throws, show a clear error: "This link is missing the encryption key. Make sure you have the full URL including the #key part."
- The key must never appear in the URL path or query string — fragment only, never sent to the server

## Context

- `src/lib/crypto.ts` — `generateKey()`, `exportKey(key)`, `importKey(base64)` all exist
- `src/lib/session.ts:29` — `getShareUrl` needs updating
- `src/components/landing/LandingPage.tsx:18` — `onStart` is where the key should be generated
- `src/pages/EditorPage.tsx` — key import goes here on load
- `src/components/share/ShareModal.tsx:17` — calls `getShareUrl`; will automatically pick up the fix once `getShareUrl` appends the hash

## Acceptance

- Create a session → URL is `/s/abc-defg-hij#<base64key>`
- Copy link from Share modal → clipboard contains the full URL including `#key`
- Open link in a new tab → key is imported silently, editor loads
- Open the path without `#key` → error message is shown, editor does not load

## Files

- `src/components/landing/LandingPage.tsx` (frontend repo)
- `src/lib/session.ts` (frontend repo)
- `src/pages/EditorPage.tsx` (frontend repo)
